Package org.springframework.ai.anthropic

@NullMarked package org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.

This package provides a ChatModel implementation that enables interaction with Claude models through Anthropic's Messages API. The integration supports both synchronous and streaming conversations, tool/function calling, and full observability through Micrometer.

Key Classes:

  • AnthropicChatModel - Main chat model implementation
  • AnthropicChatOptions - Configuration options for chat requests

Quick Start: 

AnthropicChatModel chatModel = new AnthropicChatModel(
    AnthropicChatOptions.builder()
        .model("claude-sonnet-4-20250514")
        .maxTokens(1024)
        .build());

ChatResponse response = chatModel.call(new Prompt("Hello, Claude!"));
Since:
2.0.0
See Also:
  • AnthropicChatModel
  • AnthropicChatOptions

    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.ai.anthropic.metadata
    Metadata support classes for the Anthropic chat model.
  • Class
    Description
    AnthropicCacheOptions
    Anthropic cache options for configuring prompt caching behavior with the Anthropic Java SDK.
    AnthropicCacheOptions.Builder
     
    AnthropicCacheStrategy
    Defines the caching strategy for Anthropic prompt caching.
    AnthropicCacheTtl
    Anthropic cache TTL (time-to-live) options for specifying how long cached prompts remain valid.
    AnthropicChatModel
    ChatModel and StreamingChatModel implementation using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
    AnthropicChatModel.Builder
    Builder for creating AnthropicChatModel instances.
    AnthropicChatOptions
    Chat options for AnthropicChatModel.
    AnthropicChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B extends AnthropicChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>>
     
    AnthropicChatOptions.Builder
    Builder for creating AnthropicChatOptions instances.
    AnthropicCitationDocument
    Builder class for creating citation-enabled documents using the Anthropic Java SDK.
    AnthropicCitationDocument.Builder
    Builder class for AnthropicCitationDocument.
    AnthropicCitationDocument.DocumentType
    Document types supported by Anthropic Citations API.
    AnthropicServiceTier
    Service tier for controlling capacity routing on Anthropic API requests.
    AnthropicSetup
    Factory class for creating and configuring Anthropic SDK client instances.
    AnthropicSkill
    Enum representing the pre-built Anthropic Skills available for Claude.
    AnthropicSkillContainer
    Container for Claude Skills in a chat completion request.
    AnthropicSkillContainer.Builder
     
    AnthropicSkillRecord
    Represents a Claude Skill - either pre-built Anthropic skill or custom skill.
    AnthropicSkillRecord.Builder
     
    AnthropicSkillsResponseHelper
    Helper utilities for working with Anthropic Claude Skills responses and files.
    AnthropicSkillType
    Enum representing the type of a Claude Skill.
    AnthropicWebSearchResult
    Represents an individual web search result returned by Anthropic's built-in web search tool.
    AnthropicWebSearchTool
    Configuration for Anthropic's built-in web search tool.
    AnthropicWebSearchTool.Builder
     
    AnthropicWebSearchTool.UserLocation
    Approximate user location for localizing web search results.
    CacheEligibilityResolver
    Resolves cache eligibility for messages based on the provided AnthropicCacheOptions.
    Citation
    Represents a citation reference in a Claude response.
    Citation.LocationType
    Types of citation locations based on document format.
